name: nodriver
description: Write async Python browser automation scripts using nodriver (undetected CDP) for scraping, logins, form-filling, screenshots, and bypassing anti-bot systems without Selenium.

interface.shortDescription: Write async Python browser automation scripts using nodriver (undetected CDP) for scraping, logins, form-filling, screenshots, and bypassing anti-bot systems without Selenium.
interface.longDescription: Drive an undetected Chrome instance via nodriver's async CDP API to navigate, find elements, manage cookies, and handle anti-bot checks.
